title: Staged fixture run JSON exposes rank candidate ids
problem: Ticket-260 proved fetch-candidate wiring via step recording, but execute_staged_fixture_mode_run result JSON does not expose rank1/rank2 candidate ids for operator inspection.
acceptance_criteria: execute_staged_fixture_mode_run result includes rank1_candidate_id and rank2_candidate_id
Unit test asserts both default and live-orchestrator paths populate fields
rollback_plan: Revert result payload fields and unit assertions.
